title: Zoho Pulse Auto-Popup for Repeat Form Submissions
story: As a DataTools Pro user visiting the website, I want to receive an automatic chat prompt when I submit the same signup form more than once in a session so that I can get immediate help with any issues I'm experiencing.
description:
Configure Zoho Pulse (SalesIQ) to detect when a visitor submits the same web-to-lead form multiple times in a single browsing session. This pattern is commonly seen with international visitors who may be struggling with the signup process.

When a repeat submission is detected, Pulse should trigger an automatic screen pop with a message: "We noticed that you had to submit the same form more than once. If there is anything we can help clarify, let us know."

Note: The ticket title indicates this was withdrawn, but the issue was marked as Done.
acceptance_criteria: Zoho Pulse detects when a visitor submits the same form more than once in a session
An automatic chat popup appears with a helpful message offering assistance
The popup message is friendly and non-intrusive
The feature targets the web-to-lead signup form
ux_changes: Automatic Zoho Pulse chat popup triggered when a visitor submits the same form multiple times, offering proactive assistance.
implementation_notes: Leverages Zoho SalesIQ's visitor tracking to detect repeat form submissions within the same session. The Zobot or trigger rule must be configured within the SalesIQ platform.
comment_summary: No comments on this issue. The ticket title was prefixed with 'Withdrawn' but was ultimately marked Done.
